problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: Combining Spintronics for low-power data storage with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
